title: Alchemical Emblems — Gallery 6
description: 40 emblems of Paracelsian and theosophical alchemy. Paracelsus' Aurora, Böhme's Forty Questions of the Soul, Stolcius' Viridarium chymicum, Frater Mercurius' emblem book, and emblems of the seven metals, the philosopher's stone, and the inner light.
notes: Paracelsian and theosophical alchemy — the inner transformation as cosmic process.
